description: On Grabbable Receiver Surface Received is a ProtoFlux node that monitors a Reciever for when a grabbable is let go of and is received by the Source (GrabbableReceiverSurface). The node then sends an Impulse.

fields.OnReceived: Sends an impulse when Grabbable (IGrabbable) is let go of and is received by the Source (GrabbableReceiverSurface).
fields.RecievedGrabbable: The grabbable that was recieved, only has a value during the OnReceived (Call) impulse.
fields.FromGrabber: The grabber that let go of the RecievedGrabbable (IGrabbable).
